name: io.github.theepicsaxguy/qdrant-codebase-mcp
title: Qdrant Codebase Indexing
description: MCP server that continuously indexes your codebase into Qdrant and exposes semantic vector search — enabling AI assistants to find relevant code by meaning, not keyword.

env.name: QDRANT_URL
env.description: URL of your Qdrant instance (e.g. http://localhost:6333 or your Qdrant Cloud URL)

env.name: QDRANT_API_KEY
env.description: Qdrant API key — leave empty for local unauthenticated instances

env.name: ROOT_PATH
env.description: Absolute path to the repository root to index
